creator: swig.morning0d@icloud.com
text:
The DOCS option installs some HTML files in /usr/local/share/doc/zsh, but it is not the complete manual. The included files are only the table of contents and the index. They are full of dead links to the missing manual files.

These are the dead links in the zsh_toc.html file:

% sed -nEe 's/.*href="([^"#]+).*/\1/p' /usr/local/share/doc/zsh/zsh_toc.html | egrep -v "^(http:|zsh)" | sort -u
Arithmetic-Evaluation.html
Calendar-Function-System.html
Command-Execution.html
Completion-System.html
Completion-Using-compctl.html
Completion-Widgets.html
Concept-Index.html
Conditional-Expressions.html
Editor-Functions-Index.html
Expansion.html
Files.html
Functions-Index.html
Functions.html

Options.html
Parameters.html

Roadmap.html
Shell-Builtin-Commands.html
Shell-Grammar.html
Style-and-Tag-Index.html
TCP-Function-System.html
The-Z-Shell-Manual.html
User-Contributions.html
Variables-Index.html
Zftp-Function-System.html

Zsh-Modules.html
index.html
